Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0020",
  "title": "日本移动游戏市场收入规模",
  "page_index": 23,
  "page_range": "23-24"
}

Section text:
日本移动游戏市场收入规模
应用侧载与第三方支付相关法案于年末正式落地生效
来源：点点数据自主研究及绘制。
2025年日本移动游戏市场收入规模
2025年，日本移动游戏市场在总收入达到1129.8亿元、实现4.21%的同比增长。日本移动游戏玩家的“情感羁绊”与“社群归属”始终是比单纯玩法更重要的付费核心与运营壁
垒，老牌产品能持续产生高额流水，其成功远超游戏性本身，根植于长期构建的角色故事、声优阵容、同人文化及玩家间的社群认同。需特别指出的是，日本《智能手机特定软件
竞争促进法》已于2015年12月18日正式生效，与美国类似，该法案也同样要求平台开放应用侧载、允许第三方支付系统接入以及提供选择界面等。长远来看，这必将改变现有的
渠道格局，为游戏厂商在日本市场带来新的分发与支付选择。

message.content:
**Topics:** Japan mobile game market revenue scale, year-over-year growth trends (2021–2025), market revenue concentration by game ranking tiers, regulatory impact on app distribution and payment ecosystems, player monetization drivers.
**Entities:** Japan mobile game market, DianDian (research/data source), 《智能手机特定软件竞争促进法》(Smartphone Specific Software Competition Promotion Act), legacy game titles, voice actors, fan/creator communities, platform operators.
**Dates:** 2021–2025 (market data period), 2025 (primary analysis year), December 18, 2015 (stated effective date of the competition law), year-end (law implementation timeframe), 2026 (report copyright).
**Definitions/Concepts:** App sideloading, third-party payment integration, platform choice screens, revenue concentration tiers (Top 1–10, 11–50, 51–200, Others).
**Procedures/Requirements:** Platform compliance mandates to enable app sideloading, integrate third-party payment systems, and display user choice interfaces per the competition law.
**Claims:** Emotional connection and community belonging outweigh pure gameplay as core monetization drivers; legacy titles sustain high revenue through long-term character narratives, voice acting, fan culture, and community identity; the competition law will fundamentally reshape distribution channels and payment options for developers.
**Tables/Figures:** (1) Time-series chart of Japan mobile game market revenue (亿元/RMB) and YoY growth rates (2021–2025). (2) Stacked chart showing revenue concentration distribution across game ranking tiers (2023–2025).
**Metrics:** 2025 total revenue: 1129.8亿元; 2025 YoY growth: 4.21%; Historical revenue (2021–2024): 1418.6, 1056.5, 1064.1, 1084.2亿元; Historical growth rates: -25.53%, 0.72%, 1.89%; Revenue share ranges by tier (2023–2025): Top 1–10 (~27–31%), 11–50 (~24–28%), 51–200 (~17–25%).
**Evidence Types:** Proprietary market research data, historical financial time-series, regulatory policy reference, industry behavioral analysis.

**Definitions/Concepts:** App sideloading, third-party payment integration, platform choice screens, revenue concentration tiers (Top 1–10, 11–50, 51–200, Others).
**Procedures/Requirements:** Platform compliance mandates to enable app sideloading, integrate third-party payment systems, and display user choice interfaces per the competition law.
**Claims:** Emotional connection and community belonging outweigh pure gameplay as core monetization drivers; legacy titles sustain high revenue through long-term character narratives, voice acting, fan culture, and community identity; the competition law will fundamentally reshape distribution channels and payment options for developers.
**Tables/Figures:** (1) Time-series chart of Japan mobile game market revenue (亿元/RMB) and YoY growth rates (2021–2025). (2) Stacked chart showing revenue concentration distribution across game ranking tiers (2023–2025).
**Metrics:** 2025 total revenue: 1129.8亿元; 2025 YoY growth: 4.21%; Historical revenue (2021–2024): 1418.6, 1056.5, 1064.1, 1084.2亿元; Historical growth rates: -25.53%, 0.72%, 1.89%; Revenue share ranges by tier (2023–2025): Top 1–10 (~27–31%), 11–50 (~24–28%), 51–200 (~17–25%).
**Evidence Types:** Proprietary market research data, historical financial time-series, regulatory policy reference, industry behavioral analysis.
